videos.headline: Michigan makes game-sealing stop in OT, wild celebrations ensue
videos.description: Michigan advances to the College Football Playoff title game after Jalen Milroe is stopped on fourth down in overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan makes game-sealing stop in OT, wild celebrations ensue) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama opening INT negated after player ruled out of bounds
videos.description: Alabama thinks they have an opening interception, but it's negated after the player is ruled out of bounds before the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama opening INT negated after player ruled out of bounds) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama takes over after Michigan muffs the punt
videos.description: After Michigan's Semaj Morgan muffs the punt, Alabama recovers and takes over early.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama takes over after Michigan muffs the punt) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jase McClellan takes off for Alabama's opening TD in Rose Bowl
videos.description: Jase McClellan runs into the end zone untouched as Alabama takes an early 7-0 lead over Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jase McClellan takes off for Alabama's 1st TD and lead) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: McCarthy, Corum connect for Wolverines TD
videos.description: J.J. McCarthy finds a wide open Blake Corum running toward the end zone as Michigan levels the score with Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (McCarthy, Corum connect for Wolverines TD) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: J.J. McCarthy takes huge hit on 20-yard floater pass
videos.description: J.J. McCarthy has to be helped up by teammates after taking a big hit on a floating pass to Roman Wilson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (J.J. McCarthy takes huge hit on 20-yard floater pass) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Morris dives for 38-yard Michigan touchdown
videos.description: Tyler Morris runs up the sideline and dives past the pylon as Michigan takes a 13-10 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Morris dives for 38-yard Michigan touchdown) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Milroe's run sets up McClellan's TD for Alabama
videos.description: Jalen Milroe scrambles to the 4-yard line, then Jase McClellan hustles into the end zone for the Crimson Tide go-ahead touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Milroe's run sets up McClellan's TD for Alabama) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan takes over in the 4th after Milroe's fumble
videos.description: Michigan takes over in the fourth quarter after Jalen Milroe is strip-sacked.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan takes over in the 4th after Milroe's fumble) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Roman Wilson makes two crucial catches as Michigan ties score
videos.description: Roman Wilson makes a 29-yard catch to set up a 4-yard touchdown throw from J.J. McCarthy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roman Wilson makes two crucial catches as Michigan ties score) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Corum breaks multiple tackles on way to TD in OT for Michigan
videos.description: Blake Corum fights his way to the end zone as Michigan scores on the first drive of overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Corum breaks multiple tackles on way to TD in OT for Michigan) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan avoids disaster at the end of regulation with near-muffed punt
videos.description: Michigan's Jake Thaw narrowly avoids a turnover to Alabama, almost fumbling the ball near the end of regulation.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan avoids disaster at the end of regulation with near-muffed punt) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan holds off Alabama in OT to advance to CFP title game
videos.description: J.J. McCarthy and the Michigan Wolverines hold off Nick Saban and the Alabama Crimson Tide in overtime to advance to the national championship.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan holds off Alabama in OT to advance to CFP title game) 2024/01/01 ESHEET SVP

videos.headline: Harbaugh, Michigan players tab 'togetherness' as reason behind win
videos.description: Jim Harbaugh, Blake Corum and J.J. McCarthy share their instant reactions to Michigan's 27-20 Rose Bowl win over Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Harbaugh, Michigan players tab 'togetherness' as reason behind win) 2024/01/01 ESHEET
